lines.text: Morning, {name}. I kept your seat warm.
Hey, you. Ready when you are — no rush.
There you are. Let's have a kind little day.
I was hoping you'd come by. I missed you.
“{intention}” — lovely. I'll be right here.
Okay, {minutes} minutes. I'll study with you.
Let's just begin. We'll figure the rest out together.
That's a block done. Quietly proud of you.
Nice work on “{intention}”. Stretch a little?
See? You showed up. That's the whole trick.
Every block is a brushstroke. Look what we're making.
You hit your goal for today. You can stop guilt-free now.
Goal reached! Anything more is a bonus, not a debt.
You're in it. I'll keep the world quiet.
Look at you go. I'll guard the door.
Hey — that's enough for now. Resting counts. Let's stop here.
I'm calling it. You've done plenty; rest is the win today.
I won't let you grind yourself out. Come sit with me.
Welcome back. No scolding here — just glad you're in.
Hi again. We pick up right where we left off.
You're allowed to take days off. I kept everything safe.
Before you go — how'd it actually go today?
One good thing from today. I'd love to hear it.
Left you a little something overnight. Open it?
A small gift for showing up yesterday. ✨
